title: AppDataQuality
content:
# AppDataQuality


## Properties

- **way** (`string`): The direction of the data quality. If `output`, the app computes and produces the data quality value. If `input`, the app receives the data quality value.
- **datastreams** (`object`): 
- **configuration** (`object`):
summary: Object with properties: way, datastreams, configuration

way.description: The direction of the data quality. If `output`, the app computes and produces the data quality value. If `input`, the app receives the data quality value.
